ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus where the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is being taught */,
  "session" TEXT /* Session during which the course is taught (e.g., W for Winter) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject area of the course */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Course number */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits associated with the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite course IDs for the current course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_titles" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course (foreign key) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professors" (
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the professor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the professor belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Professor's email address */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Professor's office hours */,
  "location" TEXT /* Professor's office location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course (foreign key) */,
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professor teaching the course (foreign key) */,
  "enrolled" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "avg_grade" REAL /* Average grade achieved in the course */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of grades in the course */,
  "high_grade" INTEGER /* Highest grade achieved in the course */,
  "low_grade" INTEGER /* Lowest grade achieved in the course */,
  "semesters_taught" INTEGER /* Number of semesters the course has been taught */,
  "student_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students across different programs */,
  "evaluation_scores" TEXT /* Evaluation scores for the professor and course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_professor_id FOREIGN KEY ("professor_id") REFERENCES professors ("professor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade distribution record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course (foreign key) */,
  "less_than_50" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades less than 50 */,
  "between_50_54" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 50-54 */,
  "between_55_59" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 55-59 */,
  "between_60_63" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 60-63 */,
  "between_64_67" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 64-67 */,
  "between_68_71" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 68-71 */,
  "between_72_75" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 72-75 */,
  "between_76_79" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 76-79 */,
  "between_80_84" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 80-84 */,
  "between_85_89" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 85-89 */,
  "between_90_100" INTEGER /* Number of students with grades between 90-100 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_distributions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course (foreign key) */,
  "grade" REAL /* Student's grade for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the student took the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course (foreign key) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_scores" TEXT /* Evaluation scores for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professor_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professor (foreign key) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the professor was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_scores" TEXT /* Evaluation scores for the professor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professor_evaluations_professor_id FOREIGN KEY ("professor_id") REFERENCES professors ("professor_id")
)
